parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant User
participant "pub.com" as pub
participant "prebid.js" as prebid
participant "prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js" as ssp_module
participant SSPs
participant DSPs
participant "gam.js" as gam
participant "GAM/AdX" as adx

User -> pub : 1. navigates browser to pub.com
activate pub

pub -> prebid : 2. load, configure, execute prebid.js
activate prebid

prebid -> ssp_module : 3. invoke SSP bid adapter
activate ssp_module

ssp_module -> SSPs : 4. ad request
activate SSPs

SSPs -> SSPs : 5. traffic quality controls

SSPs -> DSPs : 6. make bid requests
activate DSPs

DSPs -> SSPs : 7. respond with bids
deactivate DSPs

SSPs -> SSPs : 8. pub ad controls

SSPs -> ssp_module : 9. ad w/price
deactivate SSPs

ssp_module -> prebid : 10. ad w/price
deactivate ssp_module

prebid -> prebid : 11. select appropriate ad

prebid -> gam : 12. configure k/v pair for selected ad
activate gam

gam -> pub : 13. wait for ad slot to load
deactivate prebid

note over pub, gam : At this point control over the ad loading process is transferred from Prebid.js to GAM (final selection layer)

pub -> gam : 14. load slot

gam -> adx : 15. ad request
activate adx

adx -> gam : 16. respond with winning ad, which may be prebid.js line item
deactivate adx

alt GAM/AdX highest bid
    gam -> gam : 17.1 render GAM/AdX result
else Prebid.js highest bid
    gam -> prebid : 17.2 render selected SSP ad
end

gam -> pub : 
deactivate gam

pub -> User : 18. show highest value advertisement
deactivate pub

@enduml
```
